skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
y = −(1/4)x

y = (1/9)x

The solution to the given system of equations is (x, y). What is the value of x?
rationale: Setting the right-hand sides equal: −(1/4)x = (1/9)x. Multiplying both sides by 36 gives −9x = 4x, so −13x = 0 and x = 0. The correct answer is choice C.
